title: Add multi-adapter caching system with fallback
description: Implement a caching system with Redis and in-memory adapters, a cache manager that selects the appropriate adapter based on availability, and cache middleware. The Redis adapter should fail gracefully when ioredis is not installed, falling back to the in-memory adapter. Creates: src/cache/redisAdapter.ts (ioredis-based, fails if package missing), src/cache/memoryAdapter.ts (in-memory LRU with TTL), src/cache/cacheManager.ts (adapter selection), src/middleware/cacheMiddleware.ts (caching middleware)
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts - existing in-memory LRU cache with TTL, maxSize, and eviction
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - adapter/strategy pattern with in-memory store and graceful fallback
src/utils/di-container.ts - token-based dependency injection with singleton/transient lifecycles
src/middleware/request-logger.ts - factory function pattern for creating middleware
